text:
Quiver of Frustration (挫折の弓) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

Transformation: 11

!Card Effect:
|align=center colspan="3"|You will be able to cast as many "Leaves" as you have arrows. It comes with 10 arrows, and one will be used each time you cast "Leave."

Summary

Quiver of Frustration 挫折の弓 - This card when used, allows the user to cast as many "Leave's" as they have arrows. This card comes with 10 arrows and one is used every time a Leave is cast, regardless of whether the user already has any Leave cards in their binder.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.086 :: 挫折の弓 
装備すると残っている弓の数だけ「離脱」を唱えることができる。 弓は10本入り。「離脱」を唱える度に１本減っていく。
|-
![Eng]
|No.086 :: Quiver of Frustration 
It's possible to recite the "Leave" with each arrow that remains equipped. One vanishing each time you cast a "Leave". Bow with 10 Pieces.
|}
